card_description: Sarapis is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Sarapis/Dionysos" entity as the god who "undid determinism" (Ananke) for him in 1974."
